articles.author: Kaitlin Lange
articles.title: Watch: Police provide update on shooting near Indiana University's campus - IndyStar
articles.description: Multiple people were injured by gunfire in a shooting near Indiana University's campus just after midnight on Sunday during Little 500 weekend.
articles.content:
Multiple people were injured by gunfire in a shooting near Indiana University's campus just after midnight on Sunday during Little 500 weekend.
